scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @qidian-cms/backend & npm run dev --workspace @qidian-cms/frontend
scripts.dev:test: concurrently -k -s first "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @qidian-cms/backend && npm run build --workspace @qidian-cms/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @qidian-cms/backend && npm run lint --workspace @qidian-cms/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:api
scripts.test:unit: npm run test --workspace @qidian-cms/backend && npm run test --workspace @qidian-cms/frontend
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: playwright test tests/e2e/auth-flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/public-flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/admin-flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/full-chain.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace @qidian-cms/backend && npm run test:coverage --workspace @qidian-cms/frontend
